active_questions: How to handle checkpointing at scale?

answered.a: AI training requires 100GB/s+ throughput for large datasets
GPU clusters need sub-millisecond storage latency

answered.a: AI inference has different patterns: random reads, low latency

answered.a: Model serving needs <10ms p99 latency for real-time apps

answered.a: Data pipelines need 99.99% availability during training

answered.a: Storage failures can waste weeks of GPU time
